Scripts.OnLoad: Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTabMixin); self:OnLoad(); self.Author:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.AuthorHeading, "BOTTOMLEFT", 0, 10); self.ContributorsHeading:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.AuthorHeading, "TOPRIGHT"); self.Contributors:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.ContributorsHeading, "BOTTOMLEFT", 0, 10); self.VersionHeading:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.ContributorsHeading, "TOPRIGHT", -280, 0); self.Version:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.VersionHeading, "BOTTOMLEFT", 0, 10); self.ContributeHeading:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.Author, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.ContributeLink:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.ContributeHeading, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.EngageHeading:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.ContributeLink, "BOTTOMLEFT", 0, 15); self.DiscordLink:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.EngageHeading, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.BugReportLink:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.DiscordLink, "BOTTOMLEFT", 0, 10); self.TranslatorsHeading:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.BugReportLink, "BOTTOMLEFT", 0, 15); self.deDE:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.TranslatorsHeading, "BOTTOMLEFT", 20, 0); self.ptBR:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.deDE, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.zhCN:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.ptBR, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.zhTW:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.zhCN, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.esES:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.zhTW, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.esMX:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.esES, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.frFR:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.esMX, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.itIT:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.frFR, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.koKR:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.itIT, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.ruRU:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.koKR, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.tkTK:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.ruRU, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.roRO:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.tkTK, "BOTTOMLEFT"); self.OptionsButton:SetPoint("TOPRIGHT", self.ScanButton, "TOPLEFT", -3, 0)
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigurationHeadingMixin); self.headingText = AUCTIONATOR_L_AUTHOR_HEADER; self:OnLoad()
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigurationSubHeadingMixin); self.subHeadingText = "Borj(amacare)"; self:InitializeSubHeading()
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigurationHeadingMixin); self.headingText = AUCTIONATOR_L_AUTHOR_HEADER; self:OnLoad()
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigurationSubHeadingMixin); self.subHeadingText = "plusmouse"; self:InitializeSubHeading()
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigurationHeadingMixin); self.headingText = AUCTIONATOR_L_VERSION_HEADER; self:OnLoad()
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigurationSubHeadingMixin); self.subHeadingText = Auctionator.State.CurrentVersion; self:InitializeSubHeading()
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigurationHeadingMixin); self.headingText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONTRIBUTE_HEADER; self:OnLoad()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigurationCopyAndPasteMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_DONATE; self.copyText = "https://linktr.ee/plusmouse"; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONTRIBUTE_TOOLTIP_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONTRIBUTE_TOOLTIP_TEXT; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad(); self.Label:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.InputBox, "TOPRIGHT", 8, -4)
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigurationHeadingMixin); self.headingText = AUCTIONATOR_L_ENGAGE_HEADER; self:OnLoad()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigurationCopyAndPasteMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_DISCORD; self.copyText = "https://discord.gg/JabzHmzjWF"; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_DISCORD_TOOLTIP_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_DISCORD_TOOLTIP_TEXT; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad(); self.Label:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.InputBox, "TOPRIGHT", 8, -4)

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigurationCopyAndPasteMixin); self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_BUG_REPORT; self.copyText = "https://github.com/TheMouseNest/Auctionator/issues"; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_BUG_TOOLTIP_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_BUG_TOOLTIP_TEXT; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad(); self.Label:SetPoint("TOPLEFT", self.InputBox, "TOPRIGHT", 8, -4)
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigurationHeadingMixin); self.headingText = AUCTIONATOR_L_TRANSLATORS_HEADER; self:OnLoad()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorTranslatorMixin); self.textureLocation = "Interface\\AddOns\\Auctionator\\Images\\deDE"; self.translators = "flow0284, SunnySunflow"; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_TRANSLATORS_GERMAN; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorTranslatorMixin); self.textureLocation = "Interface\\AddOns\\Auctionator\\Images\\ptBR"; self.translators = "maylisdalan, Magnuss_lm"; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_TRANSLATORS_BRAZIL_PORTUGUEUSE; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorTranslatorMixin); self.textureLocation = "Interface\\AddOns\\Auctionator\\Images\\zhCN"; self.translators = "sugymaylis, LvWind, 枫聖御雷"; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_TRANSLATORS_SIMPLIFIED_CHINESE; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorTranslatorMixin); self.textureLocation = "Interface\\AddOns\\Auctionator\\Images\\zhTW"; self.translators = "RainbowUI, BNS333"; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_TRANSLATORS_TRADITIONAL_CHINESE; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorTranslatorMixin); self.textureLocation = "Interface\\AddOns\\Auctionator\\Images\\esES"; self.translators = "sugymaylis, NuluT, Franxavis"; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_TRANSLATORS_SPANISH; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorTranslatorMixin); self.textureLocation = "Interface\\AddOns\\Auctionator\\Images\\esMX"; self.translators = "sugymaylis, NuluT, ftg3"; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_TRANSLATORS_LATIN_SPANISH; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorTranslatorMixin); self.textureLocation = "Interface\\AddOns\\Auctionator\\Images\\frFR"; self.translators = "Prissti, Tulsow, Korthen"; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_TRANSLATORS_FRENCH; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorTranslatorMixin); self.textureLocation = "Interface\\AddOns\\Auctionator\\Images\\itIT"; self.translators = "faniel80, nimaus12"; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_TRANSLATORS_ITALIAN; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorTranslatorMixin); self.textureLocation = "Interface\\AddOns\\Auctionator\\Images\\koKR"; self.translators = "Vee, netaras"; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_TRANSLATORS_KOREAN; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorTranslatorMixin); self.textureLocation = "Interface\\AddOns\\Auctionator\\Images\\ruRU"; self.translators = "ZamestoTV"; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_TRANSLATORS_RUSSIAN; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorTranslatorMixin); self.textureLocation = "Interface\\AddOns\\Auctionator\\Images\\trTR"; self.translators = "Serdar Çoban-Hellßringer"; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_TRANSLATORS_TURKISH_INFO; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorTranslatorMixin); self.textureLocation = "Interface\\AddOns\\Auctionator\\Images\\roRO"; self.translators = "Radu Ursache"; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_TRANSLATORS_ROMANIAN_INFO; self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad()
Mixin(self, AuctionatorScanButtonMixin); self.dynamicResizeMinWidth = 40; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_FULL_SCAN_TOOLTIP_TEXT; DynamicResizeButton_Resize(self)
Mixin(self, AuctionatorFullScanStatusMixin); self:OnLoad(); self:SetPoint("BOTTOMLEFT", self:GetParent().ScanButton, "TOPLEFT"); self:SetPoint("BOTTOMRIGHT", self:GetParent().ScanButton, "TOPRIGHT")
self.dynamicResizeMinWidth = 40; DynamicResizeButton_Resize(self)
